title: Orthopedics  Department at UHDC Dehradun
description: The Orthopedics Department at UHDC Dehradun provides comprehensive care for disorders related to bones, joints, and the musculoskeletal system. Our team of experienced specialists offers a wide range of diagnostic and treatment options, ensuring the best possible outcomes for our patients.

content.overview: The Orthopedics Department at Uttaranchal Hospital & Diagnostic Centre (UHDC), Dehradun provides comprehensive care for disorders related to bones, joints, and the musculoskeletal system. The department is equipped with modern facilities and supported by experienced orthopedic specialists dedicated to delivering high-quality patient care.We offer a wide range of services, including fracture management, trauma care, arthritis treatment, spine disorders, sports injuries, joint pain management, and rehabilitation services. The department is supported by advanced diagnostic facilities and well-equipped Operation Theatres (OT) for both major and minor orthopedic surgeries, ensuring effective treatment for routine and emergency cases.With access to X-ray, CT scan, physiotherapy, and rehabilitation services, we ensure complete patient care from diagnosis to recovery. Our approach follows evidence-based allopathic practices, focusing on accurate diagnosis, timely intervention, pain management, and faster rehabilitation to restore mobility and improve quality of life.At UHDC, we are committed to delivering safe, efficient, and patient-centered orthopedic care with the highest standards of clinical excellence.

faq.question: Can this department help with joint or mobility concerns?
faq.answer: Yes. The department listing is intended to cover movement-related conditions and specialist consultation for musculoskeletal concerns.

faq.question: Is imaging or diagnostic evaluation part of the visit?
faq.answer: Diagnostic evaluation can be part of the care process when a specialist needs more information before treatment is planned.

faq.question: When should I return for follow-up?
faq.answer: Follow-up timing depends on the treatment plan, and the department team will guide you based on your progress and recovery.
